close_reason: Added nix2container and mk-shell-bin inputs required by devenv. Flake check now passes with --impure.
description:
When running 'nix flake check --no-build', there's an error about containers:

error: To use 'containers', Add the following to flake.nix:

This error appears when checking packages.x86_64-linux.ci-container-processes. The CI shell likely has container configuration that needs proper setup or should be disabled when containers aren't available.

Root cause: The ci.toml shell config may be enabling devenv containers without the required flake configuration.
title: Fix container error in nix flake check
